dashboard.label: ICP Building - Environmental Sensor Monitor
dashboard.description: ICP CRUX (MT10 Temp/Humidity: Q3CA-7SBV-ZCTA) | ICP SIDE DOOR (MT20 Door: Q3CC-WK69-K7TM) | Thresholds: Temp > 24°C | Humidity > 70%

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:sensorreadingshistory" serial="Q3CA-7SBV-ZCTA" metric="temperature" | sort - _time | head 1 | eval display=round(temperature.celsius,1)." °C" | table display
index=main sourcetype="meraki:sensorreadingshistory" serial="Q3CA-7SBV-ZCTA" metric="humidity" | sort - _time | head 1 | eval display=round(humidity.relativePercentage,1)."%" | table display
index=main sourcetype="meraki:sensorreadingshistory" serial="Q3CC-WK69-K7TM" metric="door" | sort - _time | head 1 | eval status=if(door.open="true","OPEN","CLOSED") | table status
index=main sourcetype="meraki:sensorreadingshistory" serial="Q3CA-7SBV-ZCTA" metric="battery" | sort - _time | head 1 | eval display=round(battery.percentage,0)."%" | table display

chart.title: ICP CRUX - Temperature Over Time (°C) | Threshold: 24°C

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:sensorreadingshistory" serial="Q3CA-7SBV-ZCTA" metric="temperature" | timechart span=30m avg(temperature.celsius) as "Avg Temp (°C)" max(temperature.celsius) as "Max Temp (°C)" | eval threshold=24

chart.title: ICP CRUX - Humidity Over Time (%) | Threshold: 70%

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:sensorreadingshistory" serial="Q3CA-7SBV-ZCTA" metric="humidity" | timechart span=30m avg(humidity.relativePercentage) as "Avg Humidity (%)" max(humidity.relativePercentage) as "Max Humidity (%)" | eval threshold=70

chart.title: ICP CRUX - Temperature vs Humidity Correlation (Last 24 Hours)

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:sensorreadingshistory" serial="Q3CA-7SBV-ZCTA" (metric="temperature" OR metric="humidity") | eval temp=if(metric="temperature",temperature.celsius,null()) | eval hum=if(metric="humidity",humidity.relativePercentage,null()) | timechart span=15m avg(temp) as "Temperature (°C)" avg(hum) as "Humidity (%)"

chart.title: ICP SIDE DOOR - Open Events (Last 7 Days)

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:sensorreadingshistory" serial="Q3CC-WK69-K7TM" metric="door" | eval door_state=if(door.open="true",1,0) | timechart span=1h sum(door_state) as "Door Open Events"

chart.title: ICP CRUX - Temperature Anomaly Detection (Last 7 Days)

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:sensorreadingshistory" serial="Q3CA-7SBV-ZCTA" metric="temperature" | timechart span=1h avg(temperature.celsius) as temperature | anomalydetection temperature action=annotate | eval is_anomaly=if(isnotnull(anomaly_score),temperature,null())

index=main sourcetype="meraki:sensorreadingshistory" serial="Q3CA-7SBV-ZCTA" metric="temperature" | timechart span=1h avg(temperature.celsius) as temperature | predict temperature future_timespan=24 algorithm=LLP5 | rename temperature as "Actual" prediction(temperature) as "Forecast" upper95(prediction(temperature)) as "Upper 95%" lower95(prediction(temperature)) as "Lower 95%"

table.title: ICP CRUX - Sensor Statistics Summary (Last 7 Days)

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:sensorreadingshistory" serial="Q3CA-7SBV-ZCTA" (metric="temperature" OR metric="humidity") | eval value=coalesce(temperature.celsius, humidity.relativePercentage) | stats count avg(value) as avg min(value) as min max(value) as max stdev(value) as stdev by metric | eval avg=round(avg,2) | eval min=round(min,2) | eval max=round(max,2) | eval stdev=round(stdev,2) | eval threshold=if(metric="temperature","24°C",if(metric="humidity","70%","N/A")) | eval alert=if(metric="temperature" AND max>24,"⚠ MAX EXCEEDED",if(metric="humidity" AND max>70,"⚠ MAX EXCEEDED","✓ OK")) | rename metric as Metric avg as "Avg" min as "Min" max as "Max" stdev as "Std Dev" threshold as "Threshold" alert as "Status"

table.title: ICP CRUX - Threshold Breach Events (Temp > 24°C or Humidity > 70%)

search.query: index=main sourcetype="meraki:sensorreadingshistory" serial="Q3CA-7SBV-ZCTA" | eval value=coalesce(temperature.celsius, humidity.relativePercentage) | eval breach=if(metric="temperature" AND temperature.celsius>24,"TEMP BREACH",if(metric="humidity" AND humidity.relativePercentage>70,"HUMIDITY BREACH",null())) | where isnotnull(breach) | eval time=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | table time metric value breach | rename time as Time metric as Metric value as Value breach as "Alert Type" | sort - Time
